title: C: Add /status/queues CoAP endpoint
description:
Add queue metrics CoAP endpoint to gateway app:

1. Create queue_stats struct per spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md:
   - packets_queued
   - packets_dropped_deadline
   - packets_dropped_full
   - max_latency_ms
   - avg_latency_ms

2. Add /status/queues CoAP resource (like existing /status)
3. Encode stats as CBOR
4. Make observable if appropriate

Files: lichen/apps/gateway/src/ (status_cbor.c, main.c)
Reference: spec/appendix-bufferbloat.md lines 138-152
close_reason: Implemented: Added /status/queues CoAP endpoint with queue_stats struct per spec (status_cbor.h/c), CBOR encoder, and observable CoAP resource (main.c). Returns placeholder zeros pending tx_queue integration - filed project-LICHEN-4fx0 for that.
